heading: Puppy Grooming
blockquote: We want all dogs to feel welcome and enjoy their grooming process with us and not be fearful or scared!
body:
Owners are encouraged to bring their puppy's to us for desensitisation and get them use to the grooming salon environment from as early as 4 month's old. We give puppies a positive and fun experience whilst introducing them to the sights and sounds within the salon.

We like to work closely with owners to help them be able to continue their puppy's grooming at home and we are on hand to help with handling and different types of equipment that can be used.
